title: Fyoncle's 3D Trims
description: Adds 3D Trim Templates for first person!
body: # Fyoncle's 3D Trims ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d12b2b7c6b79343387b0fd81336eeb990a86c5e_0.webp) This resource pack adds 3D Armor Trim Smithing Templates to the game that look beautiful with glowing outlines, while staying compatible with Hold My Items and Shaders. ## ⚙️ Requirements ⚙️ **Versions 1.20.1 and 1.21 & 1.21.1 & 1.21.2:** Requires [Modefite - Item Definition Backport](modefite-item-definition-backport) ▔ **Versions 1.21.4+:** No mods required ▔ **Shader Support:** Enable `labPBR` in your shader settings for trims to actually glow ## ✅ Compatible Mods ✅ [More Armor Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-armor-trims) [Frostiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/frostiful) [AdventureZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/adventurez) [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape) [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) [Punchy!](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa) [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) ▔ The mod you need compatibility for isn't there? Open a suggestion on [Discord](https://discord.gg/WFpDr7zY8Z) or [GitHub](https://github.com/Fyoncle/Fyoncles3DTrims/issues)! ## ❤️ Credits ❤️ Thanks to [GreatKingKeenan](https://modrinth.com/user/GreatKingKeenan) for helping with the core shader files and Hold My Items support! ▔ The amazing logo is made by [Vixel](https://modrinth.com/user/Vixel)!
